purpose: raw#12 pre-registered analytic ceiling for Mk.X T10-13 ossification path 4-tuple lift. Frozen 2026-04-25, no post-hoc tuning. Mk.X is dormant per docs/mk_x_engine_design_20260419.md §3 — G1-G4 gates not fired. This spec is design-phase ceiling only; real measurement requires (a) G1-G4 fire, (b) tier-10+ atom generation, (c) ossification training, (d) GPU forward (raw#9 explicit exempt).

Mk_X_status.atom_status: 82/82 EXACT atoms (81 Ψ + n=6), tier 5–9 SATURATED. Tier 10+ atoms NOT generated.
Mk_X_status.anima_vs_nexus_separation: consciousness-side Mk.X (this spec) consumes nexus atlas-side Δ¹₁ witnesses via G3 channel only

V0.mechanism: tier-10+ atoms add basis vectors orthogonal to 16-template, lateral PASS expansion possible
V0.expected_post_ossification: PASS (4/4) preserved + lateral expansion to ≥40/40 cells (≥10 atoms × 4 paths)
V0.PASS_threshold: 16-template max_cos>0.5 (current); atom-extended threshold = new spec revision

V1.mechanism: atom-level partition spectral mass ossification — discrete weight freeze gives Φ_atom_floor = 1 - 1/N_atom (lower bound, tightest binding assumption)
V1.caveat: atoms must enforce EN-KO bilingual binding to be substrate-aligned — naive ossification without bilingual constraint fails

V2.mechanism: training-time direct EN↔KO atom binding — PAIRS=[(0,6),(1,7),...] becomes atom-level dictionary entries, weight-level paired direction guaranteed
V2.comparison_to_PAPO: PAPO α=1.0 BASE-runtime = +0.164 (88% gap, AMBIGUOUS). Ossification training-time = +0.20+ (PASS boundary).
V2.caveat: atom must accurately capture EN-KO axis. mis-ossified atoms yield false self-binding (V0 trivially preserved, V2 mirror not learned)

V3.mechanism: current V3 metric (Gram Frobenius perturbation ratio) is FALSIFIED reduction-invariant (§9.3). V_RG (Mk.IX) does NOT fix metric bug. Mk.X T10-13 provides redesign substrate via tier-10+ axis atom-drop / substitution test.

metric_v2_candidates: substitution_test: replace specific atom token with semantic-distance-matched alternative, measure Gram preservation
ground_truth_pair_cosine: per-prompt EN↔KO pair cos vs random pair cos (no permutation, direct semantic)
redesign_proposal.registration_required: raw#12 new revision (old metric preserved, new metric registered separately)
redesign_proposal.PASS_threshold_redesign: TBD per metric variant — must be pre-registered before measurement

V3.critical_note: V3 redesign is NOT Mk.X-exclusive — same redesign applicable to Mk.IX path. Mk.X advantage is providing tier-10+ atom-level substrate that natively supports atom_drop_test.

composite_ceiling_verdict: PARTIAL_PASS_LIKELY_AFTER_V3_REDESIGN — Mk.X T10-13 path는 4-tuple PASS의 가장 강한 candidate (V0/V1/V2 PASS likely). 단 V3 metric redesign이 prerequisite (Mk.IX path와 공유 blocker).
decision_priority_post_cycle: Priority 1: V3 metric redesign (4-tuple PASS critical blocker, raw#12 new revision, $0 spec work)
Priority 2: V2 multi-axis PAPO extension (+0.036 gap close, BASE-substrate reachable, $0)
Priority 3: Mk.X T10-13 G1-G4 gate fire criteria pre-register (still no implementation, just gating spec)
Priority 4: Mk.X G1-G4 fire + atom generation + ossification training (GPU forward 비용 큼, raw#9 exempt 필요)

raw_compliance.raw_9_hexa_only_deterministic: satisfied — analytic only, no atom generation, no measurement
raw_compliance.raw_10_no_overclaim: satisfied — Mk.X DORMANT 명시, ceiling은 analytic heuristic, real measurement은 G1-G4 fire 후로 deferred
raw_compliance.raw_12_cherry_pick_proof: satisfied — ceiling values frozen 2026-04-25, post-hoc tuning 금지. fp 측정 후 revision은 old_ceiling 보존 + new revision 별도 register.
raw_compliance.raw_15_ssot: this file = SSOT for Mk.X T10-13 path 4-tuple ceiling pre-registration
raw_compliance.raw_37_38_omega_saturation_cycle: design (spec doc + sensitivity) → impl (this state SSOT + commit) → fixpoint marker

frozen_predicate: Per-axis ceiling ranges and verdicts not modifiable post-hoc. Real measurement post G1-G4 fire that falls within ceiling = spec confirmed; outside ceiling = spec revision with old_ceiling preserved + raw#12 new revision.
